text.title: Proposal From Discovery Template — Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to turn discovery-call notes into a sent proposal within the same client-cycle (≤30 minutes fill time).

step.name: ingest-discovery-notes
step.input: discovery-call transcript or notes (markdown); rate card
step.action: Extract three observables: pain (≥1 sentence + metric), budget signal (range or anchor), evidence links (≥1 URL to call recording or dashboard).
step.decision-gate: If pain lacks a metric OR there are zero evidence links, STOP and request a follow-up call.

step.name: scaffold-three-options
step.action: Instantiate `templates/skeleton.md` with three options: light (scope-reduced fixed-fee), standard (full fixed-fee), outcome-based (lower base + success fee tied to a measurable metric).
step.output: options[] array with name, scope, price, duration_weeks

step.name: fill-evidence-anchors
step.action: Attach an evidence link to every claim (latency target, retry-rate baseline, revenue impact). Mark sections that cannot be evidenced as `not_applicable: <reason>`; never delete a section.
step.decision-gate: If any required section is missing and not marked `not_applicable`, reject and re-run step.

step.name: add-action-block
step.action: Write the action block: ≥1 next-action (owner + due_date + action). Typical pair: "send PDF to client" + "client confirms chosen option by <date>".

step.name: validate-and-commit
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-proposal-from-discovery-template.py --file <path>`. Commit to the team's knowledge space at the canonical path. Log the close-rate review date in the team calendar.
step.decision-gate: If validator returns non-zero, fix violations before sending. Never bypass.
